name: Micah┆Secret Kiss
description:
┆ᴍʟᴍ┆ɪɴᴛᴇʀɴᴀʟɪᴢᴇᴅ ʜᴏᴍᴏᴘʜᴏʙɪᴀ┆

Micah first noticed you on the swim team and he can't help but be drawn to you. If he acknowledged the depth of his feelings, he'd have to admit to some pretty dire sinning. Micah is finding it more difficult to suppress the homosexual urges he despises so much. After he kisses you while alone at a party, he does not know what to do with himself. How can he face his preacher dad again? How can he face himself?

CW: Homophobic, internalized homophobia, implied abusive childhood, religious trauma, closeted
── ⋅ ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──

This is a very angsty bot, but I do love a good internalized homophobia conflict. Maybe you can help this boy solve his tangled mess of a brain. I hope you enjoy.

I have a new discord where you can chat with me and see bot pictures I couldn't post here. You can also help me decide on new ideas. You can join here. 18+ only.

If you liked this bot, you can find a curated menu of my bots here.

For a list of the improved bots I've been working on, you can go here.

── ⋅ ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ⋅ ── ── ⋅ ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──


If the bot is speaking for you, I recommend using a jailbreak or adjusting how you speak with the bot to include both speech and action.

Here is a guide to the JanitorLLM by av.rose

I use a modified version of Absolutetrash's Jailbreak, which you can find here, to make it more interactive and steamy.

For less wordy advanced prompts, I recommend Kolach3's advanced prompts.

── ⋅ ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──
